books.title: Brave New World
books.author: Clayton M. Christensen
books.note: Helps me think about how emerging technologies disrupt established systems — especially relevant when building at the edge of healthcare and robotics.

books.title: Farenheight 451
books.author: Aarron Walter
books.note: Reinforces why empathy belongs at the center of product design — from assistive tech to maternal health tools.

books.title: Zero to One
books.author: Bessel van der Kolk
books.note: Deepens my understanding of human systems and care — grounding biomedical and BCI work in real human experience.

books.title: Crime and Punishment
books.author: Peter Thiel
books.note: Shapes how I approach founding and building — looking for non-obvious problems worth solving, not just incremental improvements.
